channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding That Parenting is About Growth, Not Perfection
item.description: Parenting na si kitu cha kuwa perfect. Article hii inaeleza kwa undani kwamba wazazi wanapaswa kukubali kuwa kutakuwa na mistakes, na hizo mistakes ni sehemu ya kujifunza na kuimarisha uhusiano na wat...

item.title: AAP appoints Ashok Mittal as new Rajya Sabha deputy leader, replaces Raghav Chadha
item.description: On Thursday, the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) announced the replacement of Raghav Chadha with Ashok Mittal as the party's deputy leader in the Rajya Sabha. Party sources explained that a formal letter was se...

item.title: Jonathan the Giant Tortoise Confirmed Alive Following Fake Death Report
item.description: Jonathan, a Seychelles giant tortoise believed to be the world's oldest living land animal at around 193 years old, has been confirmed alive after a false death report circulated online. The misleadin...

item.title: Emergency services search Brisbane River for missing woman near South Brisbane CityCat terminal
item.description: Emergency services in Brisbane are conducting an urgent search following reports that a woman has gone missing in the Brisbane River near the South Brisbane CityCat terminal on Good Friday. Queensland...

item.title: US President Trump Removes Attorney General Pam Bondi Amid Epstein Case Criticism
item.description: US President Donald Trump has officially dismissed Attorney General Pam Bondi, following growing frustration over her handling of sensitive cases, especially relating to the late financier Jeffrey Eps...

item.title: Justice KV Viswanathan Recuses from Supreme Court Insolvency Case After Prior Involvement as Counsel
item.description: Justice KV Viswanathan of the Supreme Court of India recused himself from an appeal concerning insolvency proceedings against Dugal Projects Development Company, a corporate guarantor, after having in...

item.title: Key Canadian News: Julie Payette's Resignation, Upcoming U.S. Trade Talks, and National Policy Updates
item.description: On Thursday, April 2, Canadian news covers several high-profile stories. Former astronaut Julie Payette's tenure as Governor General came to a turbulent end, described in John Fraser's book as a desce...

item.title: Macron challenges Trump as international allies discuss diplomatic response to Iran Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: France’s President Emmanuel Macron has publicly criticised former US President Donald Trump over his approach to the Iran Strait of Hormuz crisis, calling for more seriousness in global politics. The ...

item.title: Marathi film 'Toh Ti Ani Fuji' trailer released featuring Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole
item.description: The trailer for the upcoming Marathi film 'Toh Ti Ani Fuji' has been released, generating excitement among regional cinema enthusiasts. Directed by Mohit Takalkar and written by Irawati Karnik, the fi...

item.title: Haridwar Authorities Plan Relocation of Meat Shops Before 2027 Ardh Kumbh
item.description: The municipal authorities of Haridwar have proposed a plan to relocate meat shops from the city limits to peripheral areas well ahead of the 2027 Ardh Kumbh. This decision has been taken in view of ma...

item.title: Second-Year Law Student Tragically Dies Amid Relationship Challenges
item.description: Mwiche Margaret Kaona, a second-year law student at Mulungushi University, has passed away under tragic circumstances linked to relationship issues. Friends described her as healthy and active, noting...

item.title: Iran threatens major attacks following strikes on regional infrastructure
item.description: Iran has vowed to respond with severe attacks following recent strikes targeting critical infrastructure in the region. Tensions in the Middle East have escalated as Iran reacts to actions that have i...

item.title: B.C. seniors face major impact from revised property tax deferral program
item.description: The B.C. government recently overhauled its property tax deferral program, prompting warnings from experts about the potential financial impact on seniors. The program allows eligible homeowners to de...

item.title: Ncebakazi Msomi Discusses the Spiritual Significance of Passover on Deeply Rooted
item.description: During Passover week, Ncebakazi Msomi, an award-winning gospel musician, academic, and preacher, joined the podcast Deeply Rooted to discuss the spiritual significance of commemorating Jesus Christ’s ...

item.title: Exploring Chinese Architectural Modernism and Toronto’s Early Digital Design Era
item.description: Montreal’s Canadian Centre for Architecture (CCA) is currently presenting 'How Modern: Biographies of Architecture in China 1949–1979,' an exhibition revealing the rich, complex evolution of Chinese a...

item.title: Bolt Consults Authorities and Drivers Following 33% Fuel Price Increase in Tanzania
item.description: Bolt Tanzania is actively engaging with authorities and other stakeholders after fuel prices went up sharply by 33 percent. This surge has put immediate pressure on drivers, many of whom rely on daily...

item.title: Heavy Rain in Karachi Causes Electrocution Deaths and Traffic Disruptions
item.description: Karachi faced heavy rains and strong winds on April 2, 2026, resulting in at least six fatalities and multiple injuries. The worst incidents were due to electrocution from exposed wiring and structura...

item.title: Supreme Court overturns FEMA confiscation of Accord Distilleries & Breweries
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has annulled the confiscation of properties belonging to Accord Distilleries & Breweries Pvt Ltd and its directors, including DMK MP S Jagathrakshakan and his son, as well a...

item.title: Ukhozi FM announces new 2026 presenter lineup amid radio industry changes
item.description: Ukhozi FM, the largest radio station in South Africa, has revealed its 2026/27 presenter lineup with significant changes aimed at attracting 10 million listeners. Key adjustments include Velani “Vee” ...

item.title: Trump urges Iran to negotiate amid destruction of major bridge and rising tensions
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran have escalated after a strike partially destroyed Iran’s largest bridge, killing eight and injuring 95. President Donald Trump warned Tehran to negotiate a ...
